neighborhoods.name: Downtown Christiansted
neighborhoods.description: Danish colonial historic district along the harbor with Fort Christiansvaern, King Street shops, and the boardwalk
neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Christiansted. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Mt Welcome
neighborhoods.description: Residential area west of downtown Christiansted (Walk Score ~50, "somewhat walkable" by St. Croix standards) with the Schooner Bay condo community as a notable walkable cluster; ~10 minute walk to downtown and beaches, with Gallows Bay's bakery / restaurants / post office / Seaside Market and Altona Lagoon's beach + outdoor gym / playground a short walk away

housing.predominantType: Condos (notably Schooner Bay), single-family homes, and small multi-family

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Christiansted's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Estate Richmond
neighborhoods.description: Historic mixed residential-commercial area near downtown Christiansted (ZIP 00820) on the grounds of an 18th-century sugar plantation (formerly Nicolay Tuite holdings); home to the Richmond Post Office and a mix of historic and renovated homes; close to downtown hotels (King Christian, Caravelle, Company House) and the Christiansted National Historic Site, with some local noise from amenity proximity
neighborhoods.character: Historic plantation grounds, residential-commercial mix, downtown-adjacent

housing.predominantType: Historic and renovated single-family homes, small multi-family, and mixed-use commercial

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Estate Herman Hill / Royal Manor
neighborhoods.description: Family neighborhood a few minutes north of downtown Christiansted, prized for its calm character and paved streets suitable for children; established residential with single-family homes

housing.predominantType: Single-family homes on established residential streets

neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.
